_OpaqueOutput.description: Generic envelope wrapper for bridge-registered tools' outputs.
_OpaqueOutput.title: _OpaqueOutput

description: Typed params for the OpenGiro bill service fixture.

amount_krw.description: Bill amount in KRW. Required for create_bill.
amount_krw.title: Amount Krw

bill_reference.description: Biller-side bill reference. Fixture values may use MOCK/REJECT/EXPIRED.
bill_reference.title: Bill Reference

due_date.description: Bill due date. Required for create_bill.
due_date.title: Due Date

giro_no.description: OpenGiro giro number from the biller contract.
giro_no.title: Giro No

live_probe_requested.description: Opt-in live probe flag. Fixture mode is used unless this is true.
live_probe_requested.title: Live Probe Requested

payer_reference.description: Sanitized payer reference for fixture correlation.
payer_reference.title: Payer Reference

title: mock_kftc_opengiro_bill_send_v1
